title: German Stew
description: Hearty and flavorful stew made with tender chunks of meat and vegetables, perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the stew meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the stew, diced tomatoes, and broth. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 hour.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
